FROM THE- PROVINCES

_* Monaghan

Harling is now in great swing in South
Monaghan. The Carrckmacross team
played a game in Carrickmacross against
Dusdalk, and anyone looking at it wae
well pleased, Although the Dundalk
players gave a good account of themselves,
they were outclassed by'a better and faster
team. ‘The play of the captain of the
Carrick.team was a treat to witness and
his shooting from midfield was excellent.
‘There are many others who deserve credit
‘on the team. I would like to draw the
Council’s attention to getting the fixtures
in the burling Championship on at once,
for if the County wants to field a team for
Ulster Championship it would be better to
have the county matches played so as to
pick the best players and try and bring the
double event to Monaghan.
